title: A Single Man and a Little Girl Meet
overview: After a poor childhood, Hajime grew up and made a living as an adventurer. But then he meets another orphan...

title: Rirui's Talent
overview: An acquaintance of Hajime's comes to verify Rirui's identity, but may have even more in mind.

title: Rirui and Anyango
overview: Rirui makes friends with an aspiring young dwarf craftswoman, Anyango.

title: First Love's Outcome
overview: Hajime and Rirui explore a dungeon that's due for demolition before meeting a new acquaintance.

title: What's Hatching
overview: Will Rirui's egg hatch before Hajime turns it into breakfast?

title: Decisive Battle in the Dungeon Attack!
overview: Veronica invites Hajime and Rirui to the city of Yanago to help her with some business trouble.

title: Rirui and Cocko
overview: A beaster scholar and his daughter enlist Hajime and Rirui's help, but sparks fly between the two kids.

title: A Resident of the Village
overview: Hajime butts heads with a member of the village watch, as a magic beast from distant lands becomes a threat.

title: After the Battle
overview: Hajime lost an arm protecting Rirui, and finds himself having to adjust to the changes in his life.

title: A Haircut and a Decision
overview: After helping Hajime with his increasingly unruly hair, Veronica gets dragged away by a giant spider!

title: The Power of Charm
overview: Rirui awakens to a new succubus power, but it has unexpected and troublesome side effects...

title: Hometowns and Friends
overview: Rirui's Charm power is activating while she sleeps, attracting monsters and leaving Hajime at a loss.
